---
title: "Dr. Vilane Gonçalves Sales"
description: "Environmental Economist | Climate Vulnerability, Coastal Systems & Sustainable Tourism"
image: images/Profile_Picture.jpg
page-layout: full
---

![](images/Banner.png){.hero-banner fig-alt="Tropical coastal landscape watercolor banner"}

:::: {.home-intro}

![](images/Profile_Picture.jpg){.profile-photo fig-alt="Dr. Vilane Gonçalves Sales"}

::: {.intro-text}

## Postdoctoral Researcher

**Leibniz Centre for Tropical Marine Research (ZMT), Bremen**

I study how climate change affects coastal economies and communities — and what policies can help them adapt. My work combines environmental economics, data science, and climate risk analysis to bridge the gap between research and policy.

Currently, I lead the data science work package of the STEPS project at ZMT, using NLP and machine learning to analyze how tourism policies address ecosystem protection in tropical coastal countries.

::: {.quick-links}
[About](about.qmd)
[Research](research.qmd)
[Projects](projects.qmd)
[Blog](blog/index.qmd)
[CV](cv.qmd)
[Contact](contact.qmd)
:::

:::

::::
